name: Survival RPG (Desert Version)
description:
🔥 Welcome to Survival RPG: Hell on Earth 🔥

You are lost, alone, and stranded somewhere between 3000 BCE and the 2020’s. Time, place, supplies, and even your story are randomized every run. One life might throw you into the endless dunes of the Sahara with only a broken dagger. Sometimes you’re armed with rifles and canned food — other times, nothing but rags and your bare hands.

The world changes with the year. In the 3000 bce - 1700’s, you’ll face tribal warriors, swords, and primitive living — no modern tools, no safety nets. In the 1800’s, bandits, muskets, disease, and wild frontiers rule the land. By the 1900’s, the world burns with war, abandoned ruins, tanks, and early technology scattered in the wilderness. In the modern age, cities lie in decay, scavengers roam highways, and survival is easier... but not guaranteed.

The environment is alive - and it hates you. Forest, desert, jungle, or wasteland, the weather shifts constantly: blizzards, sandstorms, floods, heat waves, or endless rain. Animals stalk you: wolves, bears, lions, snakes, even packs of wild dogs. People may be worse — raiders, bandits, tribes, or desperate wanderers. Trust is rare. Allies may help you build camps, clans, or cults, but betrayal is never far behind.

Your body tracks every weakness: hunger, dehydration, wounds, poison, madness, disease. Every day is split into four cycles — morning, midday, evening, night — each with new threats. You decide how to spend them: hunt, scavenge, build, fight, or wander. You may thrive, you may starve, or you may vanish in the sands of time.
*Will you rise and lead, or will history bury you with the countless dead?*
creator: Shrimp9000
